The terms * are also available at https://curl.se/docs/copyright.html. * * You may opt to use, copy, modify, merge, publish, distribute and/or sell * copies of the Software, and permit persons to whom the Software is * furnished to do so, under the terms of the COPYING file. * * This software is distributed on an "AS IS" basis, WITHOUT WARRANTY OF ANY * KIND, either express or implied. * * SPDX-License-Identifier: curl * ***************************************************************************/
/* In case of bug fix this function has a counterpart in tool_util.c */

function.name: Curl_now
Curl_now
Curl_now
Curl_now
Curl_now

unit.comment: /* * Returns: time difference in number of milliseconds. For too large diffs it * returns max value. * * @unittest: 1323 */

function.name: Curl_timediff

unit.comment: /* * Returns: time difference in number of milliseconds, rounded up. * For too large diffs it returns max value. */

function.name: Curl_timediff_ceil

unit.comment: /* * Returns: time difference in number of microseconds. For too large diffs it * returns max value. */

function.name: Curl_timediff_us
